name: mind-slides
description: Slidev decks for Mind — a pitch deck and a technical architecture deck.

scripts.build: slidev build pitch.md --base /mind-specification/slides/pitch/ --out ../site/slides/pitch && slidev build technical.md --base /mind-specification/slides/technical/ --out ../site/slides/technical
scripts.export: slidev export pitch.md --output pitch.pdf --wait 3200 && slidev export technical.md --output technical.pdf --wait 3200
